workload.environment_label: Local Docker Compose; server and load generator share the host; no explicit container CPU or memory limits; compose_sha256=b85237996448ead20f1c45e20211f254918268a152247520ba7b73881ae13cda
workload.database_label: MySQL 8.0 Docker image; utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci; default Compose configuration

limitations: ACK latency uses the load generator's monotonic clock; delivery latency uses wall-clock timestamps within the same load-generator process.
Acknowledgement latency measures client publish to server ACK; delivery latency measures client publish to recipient callback.
The load generator and local Docker stack may share hardware unless the environment label says otherwise.
Results from different hardware or workload settings are not directly comparable.
